'''''Petor''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that the [[Nharwaak]] forces used to protect their base of operations at the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Mylok IV Conflict]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin's]] forces destroyed ''Petor'' from Imperial [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Shamus]]'' on the Nharwaak base workshop, as a retalitory strike for interfering with the [[Habeen]] arrangement to sell new [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology to the Empire.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
